/usr/bin/ar qc libfastdevfs_adt.a CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/daemon/directory_tree/adt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/daemon/directory_tree/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fuse_ops_init.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_access.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_getattr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_mkdir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_opendir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_readdir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_rmdir.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_statfs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_utimens.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_open.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_read.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_write.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_create.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_truncate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_unlink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_chmod.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fastdevfs_adt.dir/src/fuse_functions/fs_chown.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libfastdevfs_adt.a
